title: 🔥宏观指标脱离极度压抑区
body: 市场进入宏观修复期。BMRI升至69（中性），自3月30日的43.0显著反弹。指标快速脱离低位意味着网络基本面或流动性环境正在改善，此前极度压抑的宏观状态已得到修正。配合空头面临的25亿美元清算风险，宏观回暖极易诱发逼空。结论：中性偏多。这仅仅是死猫跳吗？
title_en: 🔥 Macro Metrics Exit the Deeply Depressed Zone
body_en: The market is entering a macro repair phase. BMRI has risen to 69 (neutral), a significant rebound from the 43.0 level on March 30. The rapid move off the lows indicates that network fundamentals or liquidity conditions are improving, correcting that previously extremely depressed macro state. Combine this with the $2.5B liquidation risk facing shorts, and this macro warming is highly likely to trigger a squeeze. Verdict: Neutral-to-Bullish. Is this just a dead cat bounce?
